title: In Brasília-DF, five people observed 3 UFOs leaving a pink spectrum around them [1994]
excerpt: NOV 11th, 1994. 21:40. Duration: 30 minutes. In the Asa Norte region in Brasília, Distrito Federal, five people observed three large, luminous, white UFOs at a high altitude. text_preview: NOV 11th, 1994. 21:40. Duration: 30 minutes. In the Asa Norte region in Brasília, Distrito Federal, five people observed three large, luminous, white UFOs at a high altitude. The witness who reported the sighting to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] stated that “he was on the sidewalk of the store where she works, when she looked at the sky and saw something strange”. The three UFOs, according to the witnesses, moved in circular trajectories, being observed with the naked eye in a cloudy sky. The COMDABRA report also informs that they were: “3 bright lights, [with] the sky turning
summary: Five witnesses in Asa Norte, Brasília observed 3 large luminous white UFOs moving in circles, with sky turning pink around them.
